title: Builder: working container: assign random suffix
body:
Assign random suffixes to the working containers instead of using an
iterative sequence starting at `1`.  This speeds up the creation of
working containers as the probability of naming conflicts is reduced.
An error is returned after 100 failed attempts to find an unused
name/suffix.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body: For one reason or another, Travis has problems firing the tests. Other PRs might be affected as well (Cc @TomSweeneyRedHat ).
@vrothberg yep, just opened #1101, think I've a cure almost ready.

> One nit and a question, otherwise LGTM. The intro tutorial (docs/tutorials/01-intro.md) talks about the "working-container" being returned by default. We might want to tweak that too.

@TomSweeneyRedHat, good idea!
@vrothberg I think a rebase will clean this up.
Closing as it is in conflict with the already merged https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1102.
